structured_payload_candidate.title: Dynamic Glazing Application Feasibility
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Dynamic glazing is most feasible on large glazing facades not facing north, working well on east and west orientations.

judge_reason: Evidence does not mention feasibility, north/east/west orientations, or large facades; only general description. Application guidance not supported.
